title: settings.limits — ephemeral, tier-derived (AFB-only; not part of afb.execution.v1 wire)
description: From config/roles.yaml per the connection's tier. Never persisted to config/users/*.yaml — absent from user_file.v1.json, present only in settings_payload.v1.json (the `settings` WS response). settings/set silently drops a client-supplied `limits` key.
